features.title: Group Photos
features.description:
Great for group photos, we can fit a lot of people in when required & capture the fun!
Templates designed for your event, tailored to meet your colour scheme, brand & theme.

features.title: Clean White Photobooth
features.description: Our clean white open-air photobooth features professional lighting, a modern design and high-quality camera technology. Perfect for weddings, corporate events and parties, it captures stunning photos while blending beautifully into any venue.

features.title: Backdrops
features.description: Choose the perfect backdrop for your event with a range of elegant, modern and themed options designed to make every photobooth photo look amazing.

features.title: Interaction
features.description: The interactive selfie mirror photobooth gets guests involved with fun animations, touch-screen prompts and instant photos. Perfect for weddings, corporate events and parties, it creates a fun and engaging photo experience everyone loves.

features.title: Full length photos
features.description: Our magic selfie mirror photobooth captures full-length photos with professional lighting, allowing guests to pose naturally and capture stylish head-to-toe event photos.

features.title: Branded Templates
features.description: Custom branded photo templates can be designed to match your event or company branding. Perfect for weddings, corporate events and brand activations, our selfie mirror prints can include logos, colours and messaging.

features.title: Options
features.description: Choose from a range of photobooth setup options including LED curved walls, custom branded panels and premium event backdrops. Perfect for weddings, corporate events and brand activations looking to create a unique photo experience.

features.title: Branded Videos
features.description: Create stunning branded 360° videos with custom overlays, logos and graphics. Perfect for corporate events, brand activations and parties, our 360 photo booth produces shareable slow-motion videos designed for social media.

features.title: Sharing Station
features.description: Our 360 photo booth includes a dedicated sharing station where guests can instantly download and share their branded videos to their phones or social media, making it perfect for weddings, corporate events and parties.

features.title: Group Photos
features.description: The Vintage Tripod Photo Booth captures beautiful group photos with professional lighting and a wide camera angle, making it perfect for weddings, corporate events and parties where guests want to gather together for memorable photos.

features.title: Boomerang & GIF Feature
features.description: Create fun boomerang and GIF animations that guests can instantly share on social media. The Vintage Tripod Photo Booth captures short looping clips that add energy and excitement to weddings, corporate events and parties.

features.title: Perfect for Weddings & Events
features.description: Our vintage tripod photo booth is ideal for weddings, corporate events, parties and special celebrations, capturing high-quality photos with professional lighting and a timeless design.

features.title: Custom Magazine Covers
features.description: Guests can step into a custom magazine cover and capture stylish photos designed to look like a real publication. Perfect for brand activations, corporate events and glamorous celebrations.

features.title: Corporate Event Photo Experience
features.description: The Magazine Photo Booth creates a premium photo experience for corporate events, conferences and brand activations with fully customised magazine-style designs and branded event graphics.

features.title: Fully Custom Magazine Covers
features.description: Create fully customised magazine covers to match your event theme, brand or campaign. From corporate branding to themed parties and weddings, every cover can be tailored with logos, colours and event graphics.

features.title: Movie Covers
features.description: We can swap your guests into any movie cover or poster

features.title: AI Transformations
features.description: Watch photos transform instantly with AI. Turn guests into cartoon characters, movie-style avatars, or stylised digital figures for a fun and unforgettable photobooth experience.

features.title: Themes
features.description: Create incredible themed AI photo booth transformations for any event. From Bridgerton-style portraits to movie, vintage or fantasy themes, our AI photobooth instantly transforms guests into stunning themed images that are perfect for weddings, corporate events and parties.

features.title: Booth Skins
features.description: Choose from sleek black or white photobooth skins, with custom branded skins available to match your event, wedding or corporate branding.

features.title: Branded Strip Printing
features.description: Our enclosed photobooth prints custom photo strips with logos, colours and event graphics, perfect for weddings, corporate events and brand activations.

features.title: Branded Skins
features.description: Our enclosed photo booth can be fully wrapped with custom branded skins, allowing your company logo, colours and event messaging to stand out at corporate events and activations.
